name: coTfsLssSendStoreConfigurationRequest
title: coTfsLssSendStoreConfigurationRequest
syntax: long coTfsLssSendStoreConfigurationRequest( byte[] pErrorCode, byte[] pSpecificError );
description: The function sends a LSS Store Configuration request and waits for the response.

parameters.name: pErrorCode
parameters.description: Error code. 0 - protocol successfully completed1 - store configuration not supported2 - storage media access error255 - implementation specific error occurred

parameters.name: pSpecificError
parameters.description: Manufacturer specific error (used if error code = 255).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
